code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  if n == 0
    return result
  end
  mut cur = match list.min(xs)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  result = list.push(result, cur)
  mut done = false
  while not done
    mut found = false
    mut best = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if v > cur
          if not found or v < best
            best = v
            found = true
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if found
      result = list.push(result, best)
      cur = best
    else
      done = true
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)
let sorted = sort_unique(intersect(a, b))
let n = sorted.len()

if n == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
